overall.description: A cinematic aerial view of a futuristic cyberpunk city at night, featuring towering glass skyscrapers, neon-lit highways, and a massive holographic koi fish swimming through the air. The footage appears to be from a video game (Cyberpunk 2077), with the camera slowly panning right to reveal the glowing fish transitioning from orange to blue as it moves through the urban canyon.

scene_state.functional_zone: aerial view of futuristic city canyon between skyscrapers

agents.ego_description: stationary aerial vantage point slowly panning right across the neon-lit cityscape

entered.detail: tall illuminated glass tower with grid-patterned windows and digital billboards
dark monolithic building facade with sparse lit windows forming a silhouette
curving multi-lane highway with vehicle light trails creating streaks of white and red
large glowing advertisements mounted on the left skyscraper showing animated content
volumetric fog and steam rising from lower city levels creating atmospheric haze

segments.scene_description: A high-angle view of a futuristic cyberpunk city at night, with the camera slowly panning right between towering glass skyscrapers. Below, an elevated highway curves through the city canyon with sparse vehicle traffic creating light trails, while digital billboards illuminate the left side of the frame and steam rises from the lower levels.

scene_state.functional_zone: aerial view of city canyon with holographic display

events.description: large orange glowing holographic koi fish materializes in the air on the right side of the frame

agents.ego_description: continuing to pan right, observing the sudden appearance of the holographic fish

entered.detail: massive glowing orange holographic koi fish swimming through the air between buildings

segments.scene_description: The camera continues its rightward pan as a massive orange holographic koi fish suddenly materializes in the distance on the right, swimming through the air between the skyscrapers. The fish glows brightly against the dark blue hazy atmosphere, adding a surreal element to the urban landscape as the highway and billboards move out of view.

scene_state.functional_zone: aerial view of city canyon with blue holographic display

events.description: holographic koi fish shifts color from orange to glowing cyan-blue while continuing to swim

agents.ego_description: maintaining steady pan to follow the holographic fish's path through the city

segments.scene_description: As the camera maintains its slow pan, the holographic fish transitions from orange to a luminous blue color while swimming deeper into the cityscape. The fish continues its graceful aerial path through the neon-lit canyon, gradually moving from right to left across the frame as the urban environment scrolls past, with the left skyscraper receding into the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous rightward pan through a dense cyberpunk metropolis that transforms from a gritty urban canyon into a surreal display of holographic art. It begins with a high-angle view between towering glass skyscrapers, gliding over an elevated highway where sparse vehicle traffic leaves glowing light trails amidst rising steam and digital billboards. As the camera continues its movement, a massive orange holographic koi fish materializes in the distance, swimming through the dark blue hazy atmosphere as the highway and billboards recede from view. The scene then shifts as the fish transitions from a bright orange to a luminous blue, gliding gracefully deeper into the neon-lit cityscape. Finally, the camera maintains its slow pan, allowing the glowing creature to drift from right to left across the frame while the surrounding skyscrapers scroll past into the distance.
